description: Unlinked public review build of the Audio Jacobian Lens cached-report explorer.
interaction_boundary: Static report selection, audio playback, layer-cell hover, keyboard focus, and cached intervention inspection only; no model inference or visitor upload endpoints.
media_policy: Only the three CC BY 4.0 LibriSpeech input FLACs are included. Generated LFM and Chatterbox audio remains excluded pending derived-output review.
